parameterdescription.para: card is busy with another request
requested erase outside of card bounds

memberdef.argsstring: (struct sd_card *card, const uint8_t *wbuf, uint32_t start_block, uint32_t num_blocks)
memberdef.name: sdmmc_write_blocks

briefdescription.para: Write blocks to SD card from buffer.

detaileddescription.para:
Writes blocks from SD buffer to SD card. For best performance, this buffer should be aligned to CONFIG_SDHC_BUFFER_ALIGNMENT
card
SD card to write from
wbuf
write buffer
start_block
first block to write to
num_blocks
number of blocks to write
0
write succeeded
-EBUSY
card is busy with another request
-ETIMEDOUT
card write timed out
-EIO
I/O error

memberdef.argsstring: (struct sd_card *card, uint8_t *rbuf, uint32_t start_block, uint32_t num_blocks)
memberdef.name: sdmmc_read_blocks

briefdescription.para: Read block from SD card to buffer.

detaileddescription.para:
Reads blocks into SD buffer from SD card. For best performance, this buffer should be aligned to CONFIG_SDHC_BUFFER_ALIGNMENT
card
SD card to read from
rbuf
read buffer
start_block
first block to read from
num_blocks
number of blocks to read
0
read succeeded
-EBUSY
card is busy with another request
-ETIMEDOUT
card read timed out
-EIO
I/O error

briefdescription.para: Get I/O control data from SD card.

detaileddescription.para:
Sends I/O control commands to SD card.
card
SD card
cmd
I/O control command
buf
I/O control buf
0
IOCTL command succeeded
-ENOTSUP
IOCTL command not supported
-EIO
I/O failure

briefdescription.para: Public API for SD memory card subsystem.
